from speechbrain.inference.enhancement import SpectralMaskEnhancement
enh = SpectralMaskEnhancement.from_hparams(source='speechbrain/metricgan-plus-voicebank', savedir='/opt/pretrained_models/metricgan-plus-voicebank', run_opts={'device':'cuda:0'})
for k in vars(enh.hparams):
    print(k, type(getattr(enh.hparams, k)).__name__)
